$comment: IERC7303 discovery config for the tctc-mcp demo. No controlTokens are configured: each role names only the target contract (TCTCDemoToken 0x4C0a78803D47154B9C6F42EC4AEbab2D1C94c97D, redeployed 2026-07-11 implementing IERC7303), and the server reads the role's control-token bindings from the contract itself via getERC721ControlTokens / getERC1155ControlTokens, verifying ERC-165 support (interfaceId 0x4ee69337) first. Public RPC, no secrets — safe to commit.

MINTER_ROLE.description: May call safeMint() on TCTCDemoToken. Control tokens are discovered on-chain via IERC7303.

BURNER_ROLE.description: May call burn() on TCTCDemoToken. Control tokens are discovered on-chain via IERC7303.
